home.title: Jiaqi Zhuang
home.description: AI Builder. I build agents that move real work forward.
home.intro: I design and build custom AI agents for teams and individuals: systems that reason over messy knowledge, take careful action, and fit into the way work already happens.
home.now: Thinking about long-horizon agents, durable memory, and the quiet interfaces that make AI feel like infrastructure.

widgets.reveal: Memory is a product surface, not a hidden backend feature.

sheet.srTitle: Jiaqi Zhuang home page with horizontal sections for intro, work, projects, writing, about, and contact.

work.title: My Work
work.description: Experiments, client systems, and AI-native workflow prototypes by Jiaqi Zhuang.
work.intro: A running index of agents, workflow systems, and knowledge tools. Some are client-shaped, some are personal experiments, all are built around useful behavior.

projects.intro: Project notes on applied agents, knowledge systems, and AI-native operations.

writing.title: Writing
writing.description: Notes on agents, AI-native workflows, and building useful systems.
writing.intro: Short notes on making AI systems more durable, inspectable, and useful in real work.

about.title: About Me
about.description: About Jiaqi Zhuang, an AI Builder working on agents and AI-native workflows.
about.intro1: I am Jiaqi Zhuang, an AI Builder focused on practical agents for companies and individuals.
about.intro2: My work sits between product thinking, software craft, and operational design. I build custom AI agents that help people search, decide, write, coordinate, and execute with more leverage.
about.intro3: I am especially interested in long-horizon agents, AI-native workflows, durable knowledge systems, and interfaces that make powerful systems feel calm.
about.portraitAlt: Electronic portrait placeholder for Jiaqi Zhuang

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact Jiaqi Zhuang for AI projects and collaborations.
contact.intro: Open to interesting AI projects, especially agents and workflows with real operational pressure.
